prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约14212名、14797名、11739名、13085名、13615名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年（2023–2025）累计后移约1876 名；2025年基准位次约13615名；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021–2024年均为10人，2025年增至11人；2026年计划12人，较2025年小幅扩 招约9.1%，扩招使竞争略有缓解，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国石油大学（华东）为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第73名，近年排名稳定在60– 73名区间，属中上水平理工类高校；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音平台综合热度排名中未进入前100，短视频曝光量一般，报考关注 度处于中等水平；第五轮学科评估数据中该校学科评估信息缺失；该校传统优势为石油与天然气工程（国内顶尖），对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校工科特色契合；上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人（2025年为49276人 ），增幅约35%，考生规模大幅增加显著加剧整体竞争；该校位于山东省青岛市，对上海考生属跨省报考，地域偏好中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+1人）以及上海市考生总数大幅增加（+35%）三大关键因素， 扩招的缓解效应远不足以抵消考生规模激增带来的竞争加剧，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准13615名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约14557名，波动区间14057–15057名 。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 石油工程（入学后可选拔进入石油工程类（未来）特色班）
- 机械类（智能装备工程）（含车辆工程、机械设计制造及其自动化、智能制造工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 智能科学与技术（入学后可选拔进入人工智能类特色班）
- 经济学（入学后可选拔进入会计学ACCA方向班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 法学（入学后可选拔进入涉外法治基地班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约14557名，区间14057–15057名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主（智能科学与技术、经济学）、一档冲刺（石油工程、机械类）、三档保底（法学）。位次明显优 于区间下限（<14057名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业石油工程；位次接近区间上限（>15057名）建议以三档法学保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai comprehensive category were approximately 14212, 14797, 11739, 13085, and 13615, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In the recent three years (2023–2025), the cumulative backward shift is about 1876 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 13615. The enrollment plan for this university in Shanghai comprehensive category was 10 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 11 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 12 students, a slight expansion of about 9.1% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Petroleum (East China) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 73rd on the main list, with a stable ranking in the 60–73 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of science and engineering universities. Its reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion or record of admission gaps. On Douyin platform, its comprehensive popularity ranking does not enter the top 100, with average short video exposure and moderate application attention. Data from the fifth round of discipline evaluation is missing for this university. Its traditional strength is petroleum and natural gas engineering (top in China), which attracts some applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to have high social popularity, aligning with the university's engineering characteristics. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Shanghai is approximately 66,700 (compared to 49,276 in 2025), an increase of about 35%, significantly intensifying overall competition. The university is located in Qingdao, Shandong Province, which is a cross-province application for Shanghai candidates, with neutral regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the three key factors—the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+1 student), and the substantial increase in the number of candidates in Shanghai (+35%)—the mitigating effect of the expansion is far from sufficient to offset the intensified competition caused by the surge in candidate numbers. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 13615. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 14557, with a fluctuation range of 14057–15057.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Petroleum Engineering (eligible for selection into Petroleum Engineering (Future) Featured Class after enrollment)
- Mechanical Category (Intelligent Equipment Engineering) (including Vehicle Engineering, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, and Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Intelligence Science and Technology (eligible for selection into Artificial Intelligence Featured Class after enrollment)
- Economics (eligible for selection into Accounting ACCA Direction Class after enrollment).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Law (eligible for selection into Foreign-Related Rule of Law Base Class after enrollment).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 14557, with a range of 14057–15057. If the ranking falls within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Intelligence Science and Technology, Economics), with Tier 1 as a reach (Petroleum Engineering, Mechanical Category) and Tier 3 as a safety (Law). If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<14057), prioritize Tier 1 flagship major Petroleum Engineering; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>15057), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 Law as a safety.
